hero.headline: From opinions to decisions — fast.
hero.subheadline: SORA helps product teams align stakeholders, prioritize smarter, and move faster.

problem.title: Sound familiar?
problem.subtitle: Most teams struggle with the same patterns over and over.

voices.title: Too many voices
voices.desc: Everyone has an opinion, but there's no structured way to capture and weigh them.

structure.title: No structure
structure.desc: Decisions happen in Slack threads, emails, and meetings — then get lost.

slow.title: Slow execution
slow.desc: By the time you decide, the window of opportunity has already moved.

solution.title: What SORA does differently
solution.subtitle: A single place to capture opinions, make decisions, and track execution.

input.title: Structured stakeholder input
input.desc: Every voice is captured in a consistent format — no more guessing who said what.

voting.title: Weighted voting
voting.desc: Domain experts and VIP stakeholders carry the weight they deserve.

transparency.title: Transparent decisions
transparency.desc: Everyone sees how decisions were made and why — building trust across teams.

execution.title: Connected to execution
execution.desc: Decisions flow directly into your project management tools like ClickUp.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: Four simple steps from chaos to clarity.

step1.title: Capture requests
step1.desc: Stakeholders submit ideas and requests through a simple interface.

step2.title: Gather input
step2.desc: Relevant stakeholders provide structured feedback and vote.

step3.title: Make decisions
step3.desc: Leaders decide with full context — weighted opinions, impact scores, and trends.

step4.title: Execute with clarity
step4.desc: Approved items flow into execution with full traceability back to the decision.

valueProp.title: Not another tool. A better process.
valueProp.instead: SORA connects opinions, decisions, and execution in one place.

roles.title: Built for both sides of the table

leaders.title: For Product & Leadership
leaders.item3: Full traceability from opinion to execution

cta.title: Start aligning your team today
cta.subtitle: Join the teams that have replaced chaos with clarity.
